stories.headline: White House Considers Pre-Release Vetting of AI Models in Sharp Policy Reversal
stories.key_takeaway: The Trump administration is discussing an executive order to vet AI models before public release, reversing its deregulatory stance.

pull_quote.text: The dangers of getting this wrong are obvious, but if we get it right, there is a real opportunity to create a fundamentally more secure internet and world than we had before the advent of AI-powered cyber capabilities.

stories.headline: Palo Alto Networks Acquires Portkey to Build Unified AI Agent Security Gateway
stories.key_takeaway: Palo Alto Networks is acquiring AI gateway startup Portkey to embed security governance into AI agent infrastructure via Prisma AIRS.

pull_quote.text: AI agents have become privileged insiders, reasoning and executing on behalf of users and companies. With that power comes a new category of risk.
pull_quote.role: Chairman and CEO, Palo Alto Networks

stories.article_excerpt: Palo Alto Networks is betting that the next great cybersecurity battleground is not the firewall or the endpoint -- it is the AI agent.

stories.headline: 1X Opens America First Humanoid Robot Factory With 10,000-Unit Annual Capacity
stories.key_takeaway: 1X Technologies opened Americas first vertically integrated humanoid robot factory with 10,000-unit capacity already sold out in five days.

pull_quote.text: This is more than just a factory opening -- its proof that the future of humanoid robotics is being built right here in the U.S.

data_points.label: Time to sell out first year

stories.headline: Parallel Web Systems Hits $2 Billion Valuation as Sequoia Leads $100 Million Series B
stories.key_takeaway: Former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawals Parallel Web Systems more than doubled its valuation to $2B in five months with a Sequoia-led $100M Series B.

pull_quote.text: Everyone is building brains. Parallel is building the nervous system that lets those brains actually touch and interact with the worlds information.

stories.headline: Mark Cuban Warns Five Job Categories Face Growing AI Pressure as Automation Accelerates
stories.key_takeaway: Mark Cuban identifies five job categories facing immediate pressure from AI automation, urging workers to learn AI tools rather than avoid them.

pull_quote.text: The biggest mistake is relying on AI to do the thinking. Workers who use it to deepen their understanding and build new skills are more likely to remain competitive.

stories.headline: OpenAI Launches Advanced Account Security With Passkeys and Yubico Partnership
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI introduced Advanced Account Security replacing passwords with passkeys and hardware keys, partnering with Yubico for co-branded YubiKeys.

pull_quote.text: We are introducing a new model for phishing-resistant security at scale for the AI ecosystem.

stories.article_excerpt: OpenAI is eliminating passwords for its most at-risk users. On April 30, the company unveiled Advanced Account Security, an opt-in prot

stories.headline: Four Chinese Labs Release Open-Weights Coding Models in 12-Day Blitz Undercutting Western Prices
stories.key_takeaway: Four Chinese labs released open-weights coding models in 12 days matching Western frontier performance at one-fifth to one-twenty-fifth the cost.

pull_quote.text: Chinese-stack inference runs roughly five to 25 times cheaper at frontier capability tiers.

stories.article_excerpt: In the space of less than three weeks, four Chinese AI laboratories dropped open-weights coding models that collectively match or exceed

stories.headline: Mayo Clinic REDMOD Detects Pancreatic Cancer Up to Three Years Before Clinical Diagnosis
stories.key_takeaway: Mayo Clinics REDMOD AI detected 73% of prediagnostic pancreatic cancers at a median of 475 days before clinical diagnosis.

pull_quote.text: The greatest barrier to saving lives from pancreatic cancer has been our inability to see the disease when it is still curable.

stories.article_excerpt: An artificial intelligence model developed by Mayo Clinic can identify pancreatic cancer on routine CT scans up to three years before doct

stories.headline: Enterprise AI Adoption Challenges Surge as 79 Percent of Organizations Report Obstacles Despite Billions in Spending
stories.key_takeaway: Despite $581.7B in global AI investment, only 29% of companies report significant ROI from generative AI, with 79% facing adoption challenges.

pull_quote.text: Layoffs are not a viable AI strategy.

stories.article_excerpt: Corporate America is pouring unprecedented sums into artificial intelligence -- and getting heartburn in return. A sweeping new survey from Writer

stories.headline: Cloudflare Builds Infire Inference Engine to Run Large Language Models at the Edge
stories.key_takeaway: Cloudflare built a custom Rust-based inference engine called Infire achieving 3x latency improvements and 20% higher throughput for edge LLMs.

pull_quote.text: This architecture allows the servers to be tuned independently for the role they are performing, scaled to account for more input-heavy or output-heavy traffic.

stories.headline: Five Eyes Agencies Issue First Joint Security Guidance Warning Against Rapid Agentic AI Deployment
stories.key_takeaway: Six Five Eyes cybersecurity agencies published the first joint guidance on agentic AI security, urging slow deployment and assuming unexpected behavior.

pull_quote.text: Organisations should assume that agentic AI systems may behave unexpectedly and plan deployments accordingly, prioritizing resilience, reversibility and risk containment over efficiency gains.
pull_quote.attribution: Careful Adoption of Agentic AI Services

data_points.label: Daily decisions by agentic AI by 2028

stories.headline: Rhoda AI Exits Stealth With $450 Million to Train Robots From Video Using Direct Video Action Models
stories.key_takeaway: Rhoda AIs Direct Video Action models pre-train on hundreds of millions of videos to teach robots physics and motion, achieving under-2-minute cycle times in manufacturing.

pull_quote.text: One of the most underestimated problems in robotics is generalization from lab to real world.

stories.article_excerpt: After eighteen months of secretive development, Palo Alto-based Rhoda AI has emerged from stealth with a $450 million Series A round

stories.headline: Colorado Lawmakers Advance Major Rewrite of Landmark AI Law Narrowing Scope and Delaying Enforcement
stories.key_takeaway: Colorados SB-189 would repeal the nations first comprehensive AI bias law and replace it with a narrower transparency framework, pushing enforcement to January 2027.

pull_quote.text: If everyone is unhappy, that likely means a good compromise has been reached.

stories.headline: States Advance Sweeping AI Legislation as Federal Preemption Battle Intensifies
stories.key_takeaway: State legislatures have introduced over 1,560 AI bills in 2026 across 45 states, dramatically outpacing federal action.

pull_quote.text: The US artificial intelligence regulatory landscape is at an inflection point.

stories.headline: Researchers Reveal Key Lessons From Building Enterprise LLM Security Workflows
stories.key_takeaway: LLM security effectiveness depends on workflow design and structured scaffolding, not the model itself, yet 53% of organizations have agents exceeding intended permissions.

pull_quote.text: The difference between useless and accurate output comes down almost entirely to the structure built around it.
pull_quote.attribution: University of Oslo and Norwegian Defence Research Establishment researchers
